title: selaginella royenii
intro: Selaginella royenii, also known as the spikemoss or resurrection plant, is a type of small, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate blood circulation and reduce inflammation. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as hypertension, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits like antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Selaginella royenii include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
